name: Legends Of Runeterra Conversion: Empires of the Ascended

cards.rules_text: Predict [i](Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.)[/i]
Target permanent you control phases out. [i](Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.)[/i]

Vanishing 2
When Ancient Preparations enters, Predict. [i](Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.)[/i]
When Ancient Preparations is sacrificed with no time counters, create a Clockling token.
Create X Sand Soldier tokens.
Transform all legendary creatures you control.
When Aspiring Chronomancer enters, Predict. [i](Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.)[/i]

[i]Ascended God-Warrior[/i] — Whenever one or more creatures you control attacks, create a tapped and attacking Sand Soldier token.
Whenever you cast a creature or landmark, put an Emperor counter on Azir. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Azir has twelve or more Emperor counters, remove all Emperor counters from Azir, then transform him.
Partner
cards.card_name2: Azir, The Emperor of the Sands
cards.rules_text2:
[i]Ascended God-Warrior[/i] — Whenever one or more creatures you control attacks, create a tapped and attacking Sand Soldier token. If you control an enchantment named Restored Sun Disk, then whenever one or more creatures you control attacks, create a tapped and attacking Sandstone Charger token instead.
[i]Emperor of the Sands[/i] — If you control an enchantment named Restored Sun Disk, Azir has “Spells you cast cost {U}{B} [i](or 4 generic)[/i] less to cast”, and Azir has base power and toughness 6/6.
Whenever a creature you control enters, Azir and that creature gets +1/+0 until the end of the turn.

cards.rules_text:
Fearsome [i](Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.)[/i]
Whenever a source you control destroys a creature or planeswalker, put a +1/+0 counter on Baccai Reaper.

When Baccai Sandspinner enters, put a -1/-0 counter and a vulnerable counter on target creature an opponent controls. [i](When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature you control.)[/i]
Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to the creature with the highest power and the creature with the lowest power among creatures target opponent controls.

If Buried Sun Disc is in your opening hand, you may begin the game with it on the battlefield.
Vanishing 25 [i](This permanent enters with twenty-five time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter from it. When the last is removed, sacrifice it.)[/i]
Whenever a legendary creature you control transforms, remove nine time counters from Buried Sun Disc.
If Buried Sun Disc would be sacrificed with no time counters, transform it instead.
cards.rules_text2: Hexproof, Indestructible

cards.rules_text:
As an additional cost to cast this card, shuffle one card from your hand into your library.
Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal two creature cards with lurk, add them to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

If you have Reputation, Callous Bonecrusher costs {1} less to cast and enters with a trample counter. [i](Whenever a creature you control with power 5 or greater deals combat damage, you get a Reputation counter. You have Reputation if you have four or more Reputation counters)[/i]

As an additional cost to cast this card, shuffle one card from your hand into your library.
Predict [i](Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.)[/i]

Until the end of your next turn, target legendary creature you control gets “The next time this creature would be destroyed, Regenerate it and put three +1/+1 counters on it.”. [i](The next time that permanent would be destroyed this turn, it isn't. Instead tap it.)[/i]
When Clockwork Curator enters, remove two time counters from a landmark you control.
When Desert Naturalist enters, destroy target landmark. If a landmark you control is destroyed this way, create a Grumpy Rockbear token.

When Desert's Wrath enters, create two Sand Soldier tokens.
Sand Soldier tokens you control get +1/+0.
Whenever one or more legendary creatures you control transform, transform Destined Poro.
cards.rules_text2: When Exalted Poro transforms, randomly choose three abilities from among first strike, flying, deathtouch, double strike, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, reach, skulk, trample, and vigilance. Exalted Poro gets these abilities.

cards.rules_text: At the beginning of your upkeep, if you control a legendary creature, you gain 1 life. If you control a legendary creature that is transformed, you gain 2 life instead.
When Dunekeeper enters, create a Sand Soldier token.
Whenever one or more creatures you control attack, create a tapped and attacking Sand Soldier token.

Each creature opponents control get vulnerable until the end of the turn. [i](When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature you control.)[/i]
Create six Sand Soldier tokens.
When Esteemed Hierophant enters, you may remove three time counters from a landmark you control named Buried Sun Disk.

Target creature an opponent controls gets -2/-0 and vulnerable until the end of your next turn. [i](When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature you control.)[/i]

[i]Allegiance[/i] – When Golden Ambassador enters, reveal the top card of your library. If the revealed card is at least each colour this creature is, search your library for a legendary creature, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle.

Vanishing 3
When Hibernating Rockbear is sacrificed with no time counters, create a Grumpy Rockbear token.

Focus [i](This instant cannot be cast during the combat phase or in response to another spell or ability.)[/i]
Choose one —
• Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a landmark with vanishing, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.
• Remove a time counter from each landmark you control.

If you have Reputation, you may cast Inner Sanctum without paying its mana cost. [i](Whenever a creature you control with power 5 or greater deals combat damage, you get a Reputation counter. You have Reputation if you have four or more Reputation counters)[/i]
Vanishing 1
When Inner Sanctum is sacrificed with no time counters, put two random counters on target creature you control from among Trample, Absorb 1, First strike, Fearsome [i](Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.)[/i], Challenger [i](Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.)[/i], +2/+0, +1/+1, +0/+2, or a spellshield counter. [i](The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)[/i]
Whenever a creature you control enters, it gets +2/+0 until the end of turn.

When Khahiri enters, create an exact token copy of Khahiri with no abilities, then shuffle Khahiri into your library.
If Khahiri appears whenever you Scry, Surveil, or Predict, reveal it, then put two +1/+1 counters on each creature named Khahiri the Returned you control. [i](Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.)[/i]

When Khahiri the Student enters, put a +1/+1 counter on Khahiri the Student if you have Scryed, Surveiled, or Predicted this turn. [i](Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.)[/i]

When Merciless Hunter enters, put a vulnerable counter on target creature an opponent controls. [i](When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature you control.)[/i]

Whenever a source you control destroys a creature or planeswalker, put a +1/+1 counter on Nasus.

• Two target creatures an opponent controls gets -1/-0 until the end of turn.
The target creatures have no abilities until the end of turn.

Trample

Lurk [i](The first time each turn one or more creatures you control with Lurk attacks, reveal the top card of your library, if it has Lurk, you get a Lurk counter. Creatures you control with Lurk have +X/+0 where X is equal to the number of Lurk counters you have.)[/i]
Whenever Rek'Sai attacks you get a lurk counter.
If Rek'Sai attacked and did not transform, at the end of the turn, shuffle Rek'Sai into your library.
If Rek'Sai dealt 10 or more combat damage in one combat phase, then at the start of the next post-combat main phase, transform her.

cards.rules_text2:
Trample, Lurk [i](The first time each turn one or more creatures you control with Lurk attacks, reveal the top card of your library, if it has Lurk, you get a Lurk counter. Creatures you control with Lurk have +X/+0 where X is equal to the number of Lurk counters you have.)[/i]
When Rek'Sai transforms, search your library for up to three creatures with Lurk, reveal them, add them to your hand, then shuffle.
When Rek'Sai attacks you gain a Lurk counter.

cards.rules_text:
Trample
Whenever Renekton becomes blocked, Renekton gets +2/+1 until the end of turn.
Whenever Renekton deals combat damage, put that many Butcher counters onto Renekton. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Renekton has ten or more Butcher counters, remove all Butcher counters from Renekton, then transform him.

When Sanctum Conservator enters, destroy target creature an opponent controls. If sources you control have destroyed thirteen or more creatures and/or planeswalkers this turn, destroy all creatures target opponent controls instead, then create a token copy of Sanctum Conservator with no abilities.

Sivir enters with a spellshield counter [i](The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)[/i]
Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage, put that many Mercenary counters onto Sivir. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Sivir has thirty or more Mercenary counters, remove all Mercenary counters from Sivir, then transform her.

First strike
When Princess Sivir transforms, put a spellshield counter on Princess Sivir. [i](The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)[/i]
Whenever Princess Sivir attacks, each other attacking creature you control gets first strike until end of turn if Princess Sivir has first strike. The same is true for flying, deathtouch, double strike, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, reach, skulk, trample, and vigilance.

cards.rules_text: When Shaman Soothsayer enters, put a spellshield counter on each legendary creature and each landmark you control. [i](The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)[/i]
Give each creature target opponent controls -2/-0 until the end of the turn and “At the beginning of your end step, put two -1/-1 counters on this creature.”
Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a landmark card, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

When Taliyah enters, you may create an exact token copy of a landmark you control.
Whenever a you cast a landmark, put a Stone counter on Taliyah. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Taliyah has five or more Stone counters, remove all Stone counters from Taliyah, then transform her.

cards.rules_text2:
When Taliyah transforms, you may create an exact token copy of a landmark you control.
Whenever Taliyah is blocked, before combat damage, Taliyah deals 2 damage to one of her blockers. If Taliyahs blockers are destroyed or is removed, Taliyah deals 2 damage to that creatures controller instead. Repeat this process two times.

cards.rules_text:
When The Clock Hand enters, choose two —
• Remove four time counters from target landmark you control.
• Search your library for a landmark, reveal it, then put it onto the battlefield under your control, then shuffle.

Create a Clockling token. If you have Scryed, Surveiled, or Predicted this turn, create two Clockling tokens instead. [i](Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.)[/i]

When Time Bomb enters, roll a d4. Time Bomb has Vanishing X where X is equal to the result of the d4.
When Time Bomb is sacrificed with no time counters, Time Bomb deals 1 damage to each opponent and each creature and planeswalker they control.

Focus [i](This instant cannot be cast during the combat phase or in response to another spell or ability.)[/i]
Predict [i](Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.)[/i]
Remove two time counters from target permanent you control.

Kicker {1}{U}{B} [i](You may pay an additional {1}{U}{B} as you cast this spell.)[/i]
If this spell was kicked, create a Sandstone Charger token.

Create two Roiling Sands tokens.
Draw a card.
Target creature an opponent controls gets -4/-0 until the end of your next turn. If you control less land then the target creatures controller, that creature is destroyed instead.

Whenever Vekauran Bruiser enters or deals combat damage, put a random counter on other target creature you control from among Trample, Absorb 1, First strike, Fearsome [i](Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.)[/i], Challenger [i](Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.)[/i], +2/+0, +1/+1, +0/+2, or a spellshield counter. When Vekauran Safecracker enters, target creature you control gets +2/+0 until end of turn, and target creature an opponent controls gets -2/-0 until the end of turn.

When Vekauran Vagabond enters, choose one —
• Search your library, graveyard, and/or exile for a card named Warlord's Palace, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you search your library this way, shuffle.
• Remove two time counters from a landmark named Warlord's Palace you control.

Whenever a legendary creature you control transforms, put a Voice counter on Voice of the Risen.
If Voice of the Risen has one or more Voice counters, each other creature you control gets +2/+0.
Create a Sandstone Charger token.

Choose one —
• Weight of Judgment deals 4 damage to target creature.
• Weight of Judgment deals 2 damage to target planeswalker.

When Xenotype Researchers enters, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three creatures, exile all three creatures revealed this way, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. You may cast the creatures exiled this way from exile for as long as they remain exiled. Whenever a creature exiled this way enters, put three +1/+1 counters on it.

Lurk [i](The first time each turn one or more creatures you control with Lurk attacks, reveal the top card of your library, if it has Lurk, you get a Lurk counter. Creatures you control with Lurk have +X/+0 where X is equal to the number of Lurk counters you have.)[/i]

Fearsome, Lurk [i](Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. The first time each turn one or more creatures you control with Lurk attacks, reveal the top card of your library, if the revealed card has Lurk, you get a Lurk counter. All creatures you control with Lurk have +X/+0 where X is equal to the number of Lurk counters you have.)[/i]

Lurk [i](The first time each turn one or more creatures you control with Lurk attacks, reveal the top card of your library, if it has Lurk, you get a Lurk counter. Creatures you control with Lurk have +X/+0 where X is equal to the number of Lurk counters you have.)[/i]
Whenever Xerxa'Reth attacks, if Xerxa'Reth has power 8 or greater, Xerxa'Reth gets fearsome and trample until the end of the turn, then put a shield counter on Xerxa'Reth. [i](Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.)[/i]

When Zilean enters, create four Time Bomb tokens, then predict. [i](Look at the top three cards of your library, put one on the top of your library and the rest to the bottom in a random order.)[/i]
Whenever a Time Bomb is sacrificed with no time counters, put a Chrono counter on Zilean. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Zilean has two or more Chrono counters, remove all Chrono counters from Zilean, then transform him.
Partner
cards.rules_text2:
When Zilean transforms, create four Time Bomb tokens.
At the beginning of your upkeep, you may exile up to three cards from your graveyard, if you do, create an exiled copy of each card exiled this way. Until the beginning of your next turn, you may cast these copies from exile.

cards.rules_text: When Golden Herald enters, and at the beginning of your upkeep, create two Sand Soldier tokens.
Draw two cards.
Exile target creature. Draw a card.
Create a token copy of target creature you control, it gets Ephemeral. Draw a card. [i](That creature has haste. At the end of turn, sacrifice it.)[/i]

Eternal Gladiator enters with a shield counter.
When Eternal Gladiator enters, draw a card.
At the beginning of your end step, Eternal Gladiator and the creature with the highest power amongst creatures opponents control fight. [i](Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)[/i]

Creatures your opponents control have Vulnerable. [i](When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature you control.)[/i]

Exile up to three target creatures and/or enchantments.
Search your library for up to two legendary creature cards, put them onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

Target creature you control gets Lifelink, Fearsome, and Ephemeral. [i](Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. That creature has haste. At the end of turn, sacrifice it.)[/i]
When Spirit Leech enters, you may sacrifice another creature you control, if you do, draw two cards.

Deep [i](If your library has one third or fewer cards remaining, rounded down, you get The Abyssal Blessing for the rest of the game. Deep creatures you control get +3/+3 if you have The Abyssal Blessing.)[/i]
Whenever a creature you control dies, Toss 1. [i](Exile a card from the bottom of your library.)[/i]

Fearsome [i](Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.)[/i]
When Mask Mother enters, mutate a creature you control under Mask Mother.

Draw a card.
[i]Nightfall[/i] — When this spell resolves, if it wasn't the first spell you cast this turn, trigger the nightfall ability of target creature you control.

When Soulspinner enters, if a creature you control died this turn, put a +1/+1 counter and a fearsome counter on Soulspinner. [i](Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.)[/i]

Fearsome [i](Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.)[/i]
When The Etherfiend enters, you may sacrifice another creature you control, if you do, destroy target creature an opponent controls.
The creature with the lowest power among creatures you control has Indestructible until the end of the turn.
The first time one or more creatures block Honored Lord, put a shield counter on Honored Lord.

cards.type: Legendary Creature — Sheep Wolf Spirit Avatar
cards.rules_text:
First strike
The first time each turn, whenever a source you control destroys a creature or planeswalker, put a Slay counter onto the creature with the lowest power among creatures opponents control.
At the beginning of your end step, each opponent sacrifices each creature they control with a Slay counter.
Whenever a source you control destroys a creature or planeswalker, put a Reaper counter onto Kindred. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Kindred has two or more Reaper counters, remove all Reaper counters from Kindred, then transform Kindred.

At the beginning of your end step, each opponent sacrifices each creature they control with a Slay counter.
